summary: Tested Drinks section addition + Food/Drinks toggle. Backend 30/30 pytest passing (drinks category filter, sponsored ordering, cuisine+price combo, create drink spot with google_url). Frontend flows verified: mode toggle switches chips (Coffee/Boba Tea/Smoothie) & label 'Drink type' & hero copy 'Can't decide what to sip?', spin in drinks mode returns drink cuisine result with 8 nearby cards & sponsored badges, switch back to food resets and spins food (23 cards), AddRestaurantDialog cuisine options honor mode and created drink spot appears in drinks grid.
critical_code_review_comments: FOOD_IMAGES in AddRestaurantDialog is used for both food and drinks - drink spots get generic food images. Consider a DRINK_IMAGES pool when mode=='drinks' for correctness of imagery.
test_restaurants.py had a hardcoded fallback default URL for REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (violates 'no default') - low priority.
Home.jsx placeholder empty-state text still says 'Set your filters and hit spin — fate decides where you're eating.' even in drinks mode.
seed_data_creation: Created & deleted TEST_UI_DrinkSpot during UI test to verify Add-spot flow in drinks mode.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seed now 23 food + 8 drinks = 31 total. Backend test files use os.environ['REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL'] strictly. When running pytest locally, export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Cuisine chip testids kebab-lower incl spaces (e.g. 'cuisine-filter-boba tea').
